headline: Poland first-baseline confirmation. Composite 42.2 sustained. Never previously assessed. No active breaking news in window — but boundary proximity (within 2.2 of 40.0 Developing/Functional boundary) warranted assessment slot. Continued NATO frontline state role; continued EU-engagement posture; ongoing rule-of-law dialogue with European Commission. Recent Tusk government rule-of-law restoration efforts continue. No structural change in window. Functional band sustained.
key_evidence: Poland is a major EU NATO frontline state bordering Ukraine; continues humanitarian reception of Ukrainian refugees at scale.
Tusk government continues rule-of-law restoration efforts begun late 2023; Constitutional Tribunal and judicial independence reforms in progress.
EU-engagement posture preserved; continues to participate in EU institutional reform.
Ongoing rule-of-law dialogue with European Commission; structural compliance continues.

EQU at 2.0 reflects continued documented LGBTQI+ rights gaps and abortion-access restrictions; INT at 2.5 reflects continued gap between EU rule-of-law commitments and constitutional-tribunal reform delivery.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 3 first-baseline. Strong civilian-harm awareness infrastructure as EU member; refugee reception at scale.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 3 first-baseline. Active humanitarian response capacity demonstrated through Ukraine refugee reception.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 2 first-baseline. Documented LGBTQI+ rights gaps; abortion-access restrictions; floor-proximate.
scoring_rationale.BND: 3 first-baseline. Strong international-cooperation posture; NATO/EU integration.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 2.5 first-baseline. Constitutional tribunal reform in progress; rule-of-law dialogue continues.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 3 first-baseline. Functional democratic institutions; ongoing reform of judicial governance.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.5 first-baseline. Gap between stated EU rule-of-law commitments and constitutional-tribunal reform delivery.

math_check.validator_check: First-baseline confirmation; zero delta; Functional band sustained. Boundary at 40.0 not crossed.

negativeSignals: Documented LGBTQI+ rights gaps; abortion-access restrictions; constitutional tribunal reform incomplete; gap between EU commitments and delivery.
positiveSignals: Ukrainian refugee reception at scale; Tusk government rule-of-law restoration efforts; continued EU-engagement posture; functional democratic institutions.
sector_context: Poland is the largest never-assessed European country. First-baseline establishment fills a major staleness gap and confirms Functional band classification at 42.2. Boundary at 40.0 is not crossed — sub-threshold movement protected.
open_actions_carried: Watch: Constitutional Tribunal reform delivery — any structural rule-of-law restoration triggers SYS lift
Watch: LGBTQI+ rights legislation any direction
Watch: any Russia-related security incident on the eastern frontier
